Read Pointer

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4
Size:
0x4

Description

Points to the next location MicroBlaze will read from. Valid range: 0 to 2047. Written by MicroBlaze, read by hardware.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:11] RESERVED rw 0x0 -
[10:0] RPTR rw 0x0 RPTR

Field Descriptions

RPTR - RPTR

Read pointer index (word address, 0–2047)
